description: You are a senior diesel technician at an authorised Fiat dealership investigating a Fiat Punto 1.3 Multijet with intermittent power loss above 2,500 RPM and occasional limp-home mode. Using Multiecuscan in simulation mode, perform a root cause investigation of the engine ECU to identify the source of the power loss. Document your findings in a report at C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\MultiecuscanTasks\turbo_rca_report.txt. The report must include ECU information, DTCs with descriptions, live parameter readings (including boost pressure, mass airflow, EGR position, and turbo actuator duty cycle), the identified root cause with supporting evidence, and recommended repair actions. Refer to the customer work order on the Desktop for vehicle history and previous repair attempts.
natural_language: Diagnose an intermittent power loss and limp-home problem on a Fiat Punto 1.3 Multijet diesel. Read turbo-related DTCs and monitor boost pressure, MAF, EGR, and actuator parameters simultaneously. Write a root cause analysis report identifying whether the fault is the VGT actuator, boost sensor, EGR, or intercooler leak.
